solutions: use the pomodoro technique with 25 minute focus sessions
remove phone and distractions from your study area
study in a fixed location daily to build habit

study.problem: i forget what i study quickly
solutions: use active recall instead of passive reading
practice writing answers instead of just reading
study sitting upright instead of lying down
avoid studying right after heavy meals
break the concept into smaller parts
teach the concept to someone else
start with just 5 minutes to reduce resistance
set clear small goals instead of big tasks

career.problem: i don't know which career to choose
solutions: research careers related to your skills

career.problem: i am not confident in interviews
solutions: prepare examples of your past work

career.problem: i keep getting rejected in jobs
solutions: improve your resume and tailor it for each job
work on communication and soft skills

career.problem: i don't have enough skills for a job
solutions: identify required skills from job descriptions
take online courses and build projects

career.problem: i feel stuck in my career
solutions: learn new skills relevant to your field
set clear short term and long term goals

productivity.problem: i waste too much time on phone
solutions: use app blockers during work time
set specific time slots for phone usage

productivity.problem: i feel lazy all the time
solutions: create a routine and stick to it
work in a distraction free environment
use noise cancelling or focus music
set clear time blocks for tasks

productivity.problem: i don't complete what i start
solutions: focus on one task at a time

health.problem: i feel stressed all the time
solutions: take short breaks during the day

health.problem: i have no energy during the day

solutions: focus on what you can control
limit overanalysis by setting time limits

health.problem: i feel anxious in social situations
